text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
choice_data_list: We'll take the lead next time!
Let's head back and get right back into training!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I don't like being boxed up like I was in
that race...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Next time, I'll be running in the lead, no doubt.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Please, make me run more and more... until no
one can ever overtake me.
